idea_papers.title: The devil in the detail: how can environmental justice improve theorization for sustainable supply chain management?
idea_papers.title_cn: 细节中的魔鬼：环境正义如何改善可持续供应链管理的理论化？
idea_papers.abstract: Purpose Sustainable supply chain management (SSCM) research has often adopted instrumental logic whereby sustainability helps defend profitability. Recently, environmental justice (EJ) has been proposed as grounds for a new approach to SSCM. This research aims to explore Schlosberg’s environmental justice framework to aid theorization via the empirical investigation of a major international supply chain sustainability initiative. Design/methodology/approach Using multimodal critical discourse analysis, the authors examined 142 videos published by the Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil, a multi-stakeholder initiative (MSI) actively promoting elements of EJ across multiple supply chain levels. Findings EJ principles (distributional, recognitional, procedural and the capability approach) are strongly embedded in the MSI discourse but operationalized as instrumental. This means achieving EJ is seen as helping to defend profitability. The study further found various contradictions presented in the EJ discourse and that public policy interventions, notably the 2023 European Union Deforestation-free Products Directive, have been seen as risking EJ, leading to concern. The interplay between instrumental profit-maximization and noninstrumental public goals (e.g. on climate and biodiversity) for advancing supply chain justice are discussed to aid future research. Originality/value This study provides empirical evidence on how environmental justice is framed and enacted through instrumental propositions. This counters prior claims suggesting justice is inherently noninstrumental. Furthermore, evidence on how EJ outcomes are affected by changes to public policy highlights the importance of mandatory requirements.
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 目的：可持续供应链管理（SSCM）研究通常采用工具逻辑，即可持续性有助于维护盈利能力。最近，环境正义（EJ）被提出作为一种新的SSCM方法的基础。本研究旨在探索施洛斯伯格的环境正义框架，通过对一个主要国际供应链可持续性倡议的实证调查来辅助理论化。设计/方法论/方法：作者使用多模态批判性话语分析，研究了142个由可持续棕榈油圆桌会议发布的视频，该多方利益相关者倡议（MSI）积极推动EJ的各个供应链层面的要素。研究结果：EJ原则（分配性、承认性、程序性和能力方法）在MSI话语中得到了强有力的嵌入，但被工具化地操作。这意味着实现EJ被视为有助于维护盈利能力。研究进一步发现，EJ话语中存在各种矛盾，并且公共政策干预，特别是2023年欧盟无森林砍伐产品指令，被视为可能危及EJ，导致人们的担忧。讨论了工具性利润最大化与非工具性公共目标（例如气候和生物多样性）之间的相互作用，以促进供应链正义的研究。原创性/价值：本研究提供了关于环境正义如何通过工具性命题被框架和实施的实证证据。这反驳了先前声称正义本质上是非工具性的观点。此外，关于EJ结果如何受到公共政策变化影响的证据突显了强制性要求的重要性。

idea_papers.title: Correction to “Does trust matter more in virtual teams? A meta-analysis of trust and team effectiveness considering virtuality and documentation as moderators” by Breuer et al. (2016).
idea_papers.title_cn: 对Breuer等人（2016）“信任在虚拟团队中是否更重要？考虑虚拟性和文档化作为调节变量的信任与团队效能的元分析”一文的更正。
idea_papers.abstract: Reports an error in "Does trust matter more in virtual teams? A meta-analysis of trust and team effectiveness considering virtuality and documentation as moderators" by Christina Breuer, Joachim Hüffmeier and Guido Hertel (Journal of Applied Psychology, 2016[Aug], Vol 101[8], 1151-1177; see record 2016-25877-001). In the article, the formula used to calculate t values to examine categorical moderators for the association between team trust and task performance is incorrect. This error is reflected in Table 3, and the correct t values are shown below. The second and third sentences in Footnote 12 are also incorrect. The corrected Table 3 is present in the erratum. (The following abstract of the original article appeared in record 2016-25877-001). Team trust has often been discussed both as requirement and as challenge for team effectiveness, particularly in virtual teams. However, primary studies on the relationship between trust and team effectiveness have provided mixed findings. The current review summarizes existing studies on team trust and team effectiveness based on meta-analytic methodology. In general, we assumed team trust to facilitate coordination and cooperation in teams, and therefore to be positively related with team effectiveness. Moreover, team virtuality and documentation of interactions were considered as moderators of this relationship because they should affect perceived risks during teamwork. While team virtuality should increase, documentation of interaction should decrease the relationship between team trust and team effectiveness. Findings from 52 studies with 54 independent samples (representing 12,615 individuals in 1,850 teams) confirmed our assumptions. In addition to the positive overall relationship between team trust and team effectiveness criteria (ρ = .33), the relationship between team trust and team performance was stronger in virtual teams (ρ = .33) as compared to face-to-face teams (ρ = .22), and weaker when team interactions were documented (ρ = .20) as compared to no such documentation (ρ = .29). Thus, documenting team interactions seems to be a viable complement to trust-building activities, particularly in virtual teams. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 报告了Christina Breuer、Joachim Hüffmeier和Guido Hertel在《应用心理学杂志》（2016年8月，第101卷第8期，1151-1177页）中发表的文章“信任在虚拟团队中是否更为重要？关于信任与团队效能的元分析，考虑虚拟性和文档化作为调节变量”的错误（见记录2016-25877-001）。文章中用于计算t值以检验团队信任与任务表现之间关系的分类调节变量的公式不正确。此错误在表3中有所体现，正确的t值如下。脚注12中的第二和第三句也不正确。更正后的表3已在勘误中提供。（以下是原始文章的摘要，出现在记录2016-25877-001中。）团队信任常被讨论作为团队效能的要求和挑战，尤其是在虚拟团队中。然而，关于信任与团队效能之间关系的主要研究结果不一。本次综述基于元分析方法总结了现有的团队信任与团队效能的研究。一般而言，我们假设团队信任有助于团队的协调与合作，因此与团队效能呈正相关。此外，团队的虚拟性和互动文档化被视为该关系的调节变量，因为它们应影响团队合作中的感知风险。虽然团队虚拟性应增加团队信任与团队效能之间的关系，但互动文档化应减少这种关系。来自52项研究的54个独立样本（代表12,615名个体在1,850个团队中）证实了我们的假设。除了团队信任与团队效能标准之间的正相关关系（ρ = .33）外，虚拟团队中团队信任与团队表现之间的关系（ρ = .33）强于面对面团队（ρ = .22），而在有文档化的团队互动中，这种关系（ρ = .20）则弱于没有文档化的情况（ρ = .29）。因此，文档化团队互动似乎是信任建立活动的一个可行补充，尤其是在虚拟团队中。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有。）

idea_papers.title: The paradox of structural empowerment: How and when structural empowerment fuels psychological entitlement and undermines resource sharing.
idea_papers.title_cn: 结构性赋权的悖论：结构性赋权如何以及何时助长心理权利感并削弱资源共享。
idea_papers.abstract: In recent decades, many organizations have been restructuring in ways that formally decentralize the necessary resources, information, and sociopolitical support, which is labeled "structural empowerment." Although prior research suggests that structural empowerment enhances resource exchanges, I challenge this conventional wisdom by theorizing its potential drawbacks for resource sharing. Integrating the evolutionary perspective of work design and the dominance-prestige model, I developed a comprehensive model of how and when structural empowerment can hinder employees' resource sharing via psychological entitlement. I employed multiwave (Study 1) and multisource (Studies 2 and 3) field surveys and experimental methodology (Study 4) to test my hypotheses. The results reveal that dominance-oriented individuals are more likely to feel entitled in response to structural empowerment. Moreover, psychological entitlement decreases resource sharing. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 近年来，许多组织以正式分散必要资源、信息和社会政治支持的方式进行重组，这被称为“结构性赋权”。尽管先前的研究表明，结构性赋权增强了资源交换，但我对这一传统观点提出质疑，理论化其在资源共享方面的潜在缺陷。通过整合工作设计的进化视角和主导-威望模型，我开发了一个全面的模型，探讨了结构性赋权如何以及何时通过心理特权阻碍员工的资源共享。我采用了多波次（研究1）和多来源（研究2和3）现场调查以及实验方法（研究4）来检验我的假设。结果显示，主导导向的个体在面对结构性赋权时更可能感到有特权。此外，心理特权会减少资源共享。（PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，版权所有）

idea_papers.title: Thinking and feeling about novelty: How cognition and emotion shape investment in novel ideas
idea_papers.title_cn: 思考与感受新颖性：认知与情感如何影响对新想法的投资
idea_papers.abstract: Abstract While prior research on the strategic framing of innovation highlights the cognitive mechanisms underlying novelty evaluation, we know little about the corresponding emotional mechanisms. Drawing on appraisal theory, construal level theory, and the literature on emotions, we theorize two distinct appraisal‐emotion pathways through which the framing of novel ideas evokes hope and awe among investors with different motives. We argue that high‐construal framing supplements economically motivated investors' low‐level feasibility orientation, which evokes hope and increases their willingness to invest. By contrast, low‐construal framing supplements non‐economically motivated investors' high‐level desirability orientation, which evokes awe and increases their willingness to invest. We test and find some support for these within‐motive pathways across three studies. Our study offers new theoretical and practical insights on the strategic framing of novel ideas.
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 摘要 以往关于创新战略框架的研究强调了新颖性评估背后的认知机制，但我们对相应的情感机制知之甚少。基于评估理论、构念层次理论以及情感文献，我们理论化了两条不同的评估-情感路径，通过这些路径，新颖想法的框架能够在具有不同动机的投资者中引发希望和敬畏。我们认为，高层次构念框架补充了经济动机投资者的低层次可行性导向，从而引发希望并增加他们的投资意愿。相反，低层次构念框架补充了非经济动机投资者的高层次可取性导向，从而引发敬畏并增加他们的投资意愿。我们在三项研究中进行了测试，并发现对这些动机内路径有一定的支持。我们的研究为新颖想法的战略框架提供了新的理论和实践见解。

idea_papers.title: EXPRESS: Will Machines Take Over? Algorithms for Human-Machine Collaborative Decision Making in Healthcare
idea_papers.title_cn: 机器会接管吗？医疗保健中人机协作决策的算法
idea_papers.abstract: Despite significant advancements in predictive artificial intelligence (AI), organizations continue to grapple with determining the most effective integration of AI into their operations, particularly in combining AI with human capabilities in task execution. This paper introduces a diagnostic system aimed at minimizing costs while maintaining patient safety in hospitals by efficiently allocating mammography interpretation tasks between AI algorithms and radiologists. The optimal diagnostic system employs algorithm-generated risk scores for mammograms to determine if additional assessment by a radiologist is necessary. It evaluates the costs of two approaches—automation, where AI completely replaces human interpretation, and delegation, where AI and radiologists share interpretation tasks–compared to the current expert-alone strategy. When AI performance does not exceed that of radiologists, the optimal design is a simple two-threshold policy: AI recommends no follow-up for low-risk cases, recommends follow-up for high-risk cases, and delegates ambiguous cases in between to radiologists; the thresholds are analytically derived and state-independent. This two-threshold policy is state-independent and that optimal thresholds are not contingent on the diagnostic system’s prior history. We demonstrate our system’s performance by back-testing against real-life scenarios, utilizing data from a mammography AI contest and real-world cost and performance metrics. Backtesting demonstrates potential cost savings of up to 20.9% compared to the expert-alone approach. Beyond radiology imaging, our work holds significant implications for the design of workflows in the AI era and human-machine collaboration contexts.
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 尽管预测人工智能（AI）取得了显著进展，组织在确定如何将AI有效整合到其运营中，尤其是在任务执行中将AI与人类能力结合方面，仍然面临挑战。本文介绍了一种诊断系统，旨在通过在AI算法与放射科医生之间有效分配乳腺X光检查解读任务，来最小化成本同时保持医院患者安全。该最优诊断系统利用算法生成的乳腺X光检查风险评分来判断是否需要放射科医生进行额外评估。它评估了两种方法的成本——自动化，即AI完全取代人工解读，以及委托，即AI与放射科医生共享解读任务——与当前的专家单独策略进行比较。当AI的表现未超过放射科医生时，最优设计为简单的双阈值政策：AI对低风险病例不推荐后续检查，对高风险病例推荐后续检查，并将中间模糊病例委托给放射科医生；这些阈值是通过分析推导的，并且与状态无关。该双阈值政策是状态无关的，最优阈值不依赖于诊断系统的历史记录。我们通过对真实场景进行回测来展示系统的性能，利用来自乳腺X光AI竞赛的数据以及现实世界的成本和性能指标。回测结果显示，与专家单独方法相比，潜在的成本节省可达20.9%。除了放射影像学，我们的研究对AI时代和人机协作背景下的工作流程设计具有重要意义。

idea_papers.title: To Adopt or Not: The Paradox of AR Fitting Technology in Retail Channels
idea_papers.title_cn: 采用还是不采用：零售渠道中增强现实试衣技术的悖论
idea_papers.abstract: As brick-and-mortar retail rebounds, congestion in fitting rooms has reemerged as a critical operational challenge. Augmented reality (AR) fitting applications offer a scalable solution by enabling rapid virtual trials and reducing in-store delays, yet imperfect assessments may increase product mismatches. This study provides actionable guidance for retailers on AR adoption and pricing strategies by clarifying the economic roles of the substitution and complementarity effects. Our findings underscore the importance of a market-contingent approach to AR adoption and system upgrades. Rather than presuming that improvements in accuracy or usability will uniformly enhance performance, retailers and IT managers should rigorously evaluate how technological capabilities interact with market size, price fluctuations, and congestion dynamics. We also inform targeted marketing by demonstrating how heterogeneity in consumer technology preferences shapes channel selection and effective transaction outcomes. More broadly, our results caution policymakers that emerging digital technologies—while intended to reduce friction—may generate unintended welfare losses if mismatch risks and strategic responses are overlooked. These insights provide actionable guidance for digital transformation initiatives in retail and other capacity-constrained service systems characterized by heterogeneous consumers.
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 随着实体零售的复苏，试衣间的拥堵再次成为一个关键的运营挑战。增强现实（AR）试衣应用提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，通过快速的虚拟试穿来减少店内延误，但不完美的评估可能会增加产品不匹配的风险。本研究通过阐明替代效应和互补效应的经济角色，为零售商在AR采纳和定价策略方面提供了可行的指导。我们的研究结果强调了基于市场情况的AR采纳和系统升级的重要性。零售商和IT经理不应假设准确性或可用性的提升会均匀地提高绩效，而应严格评估技术能力如何与市场规模、价格波动和拥堵动态相互作用。我们还通过展示消费者技术偏好的异质性如何影响渠道选择和有效交易结果，来为有针对性的市场营销提供信息。更广泛地说，我们的结果提醒政策制定者，尽管新兴数字技术旨在减少摩擦，但如果忽视不匹配风险和战略响应，可能会产生意想不到的福利损失。这些见解为零售及其他以异质消费者为特征的容量受限服务系统中的数字转型倡议提供了可行的指导。

idea_papers.title: The duality of duality: Generative and disruptive climate configurations for innovation
idea_papers.title_cn: 双重性的双重性：创新的生成性和颠覆性气候配置
idea_papers.abstract: Organizational climate is seen as a key driver of organizational performance, including sustained innovation. However, there is limited work on the effects of climate duality on innovation. The co-existence of two distinct climate dimensions (duality) in an organization creates the potential for both generative and disruptive dualities. By dividing the innovation process into an idea generation stage and an innovation implementation stage, we develop a theory linking climate duality and the generative–disruptive dichotomy at each stage of the innovation process. In particular, we argue that climate duality should be generative at the idea stage and disruptive at the implementation stage. Using data from the 2018 Australian Public Service Employee Census ( N = 59,870), we test the distinct effects of climate duality at each stage. We conclude with a discussion of the implications of these findings for theories of work climate and innovation. • Advance workplace climate research with a configurational approach examining interactions among multiple workplace climates • Theorize relationship between duality (co-existence of go-getter and inclusive climates) and stages of innovation process • Use Australian Public Service Employee Census to show climate duality benefits idea generation (a divergent process) • Find climate duality hinders implementation (a convergent process), revealing paradoxical effects on innovation • Extend theories of climate duality and innovation to public organizations, contributing to cross-sector understanding
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 组织气候被视为组织绩效的关键驱动因素，包括持续创新。然而，关于气候二元性对创新影响的研究相对有限。组织内两个不同气候维度的共存（二元性）为生成性和破坏性双重性创造了潜在可能性。通过将创新过程分为构思阶段和实施阶段，我们发展了一个理论，将气候二元性与创新过程每个阶段的生成性-破坏性二分法联系起来。我们特别认为，气候二元性在构思阶段应表现为生成性，而在实施阶段应表现为破坏性。利用2018年澳大利亚公共服务员工普查的数据（N = 59,870），我们检验了气候二元性在每个阶段的独特影响。最后，我们讨论了这些发现对工作气候和创新理论的意义。 • 通过配置方法推进工作场所气候研究，考察多种工作场所气候之间的互动 • 理论化二元性（追求型气候与包容型气候的共存）与创新过程各阶段之间的关系 • 利用澳大利亚公共服务员工普查数据展示气候二元性有利于构思生成（一个发散过程） • 发现气候二元性阻碍实施（一个聚合过程），揭示对创新的悖论性影响 • 将气候二元性和创新理论扩展至公共组织，为跨部门理解做出贡献。

idea_papers.title: Pathways to upscaling: aligning capabilities with supply chain design in automotive manufacturing
idea_papers.title_cn: 扩大规模的途径：在汽车制造中将能力与供应链设计对齐
idea_papers.abstract: Purpose Taking innovation to scale and accelerating the development of new technologies puts pressure on manufacturers to perform frequent ramp-ups in increasingly volatile markets. Such pressures inevitably bring the role of supply chain right at the centre of the challenge to design supply chains that are ready to upscale. This research aims to explore how manufacturers can design their supply chain and deploy the required capabilities to respond to the upscaling demands. Design/methodology/approach Drawing on the dynamic capabilities (DCs) theory, this study develops a conceptual framework which is validated through multiple case studies. Data was collected and analysed from 14 upscaling projects in automotive manufacturing. Findings This study identified specific DCs (e.g. dynamic relational capabilities) that manufacturers deployed in their upscaling projects, explored their micro-foundations, showed how these are coupled with different supply chain designs (SCDs) and how those matches evolve over time. A distinctive finding is the need for automotive manufacturers involved in innovative and technological upscaling projects, to move away from the traditional binary SCD choice (i.e. modular vs integral) to a less rigid SCD which we called “evolving SCD” and proved to be particularly valuable for companies with limited resources and evolving market positions. Practical implications This research outlines actionable pathways for upscaling and offers guidance on aligning SCD with capabilities. The findings also illustrate how managers can leverage temporal configurational shifts to strategically address evolving priorities from initial market entry concerns like IP protection and capability access, to later-stage challenges around supplier reliability and volume capacity. Originality/value This study introduces the concept of the evolving SCD which is particularly suitable for start-up companies in meeting the upscaling requirements. This research enriches the understanding on how to manage upscaling projects by offering fresh empirical insights into how manufacturers can successfully upscale by streamlining the SCD with capabilities.
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 目的：将创新扩大规模并加速新技术的发展，使制造商在日益波动的市场中面临频繁增产的压力。这种压力不可避免地将供应链的角色置于设计准备好扩展的供应链挑战的中心。此次研究旨在探讨制造商如何设计其供应链并部署所需的能力，以应对扩展需求。设计/方法论：本研究基于动态能力（DCs）理论，开发了一个概念框架，并通过多个案例研究进行了验证。数据采集和分析来自14个汽车制造领域的扩展项目。发现：本研究识别出了制造商在扩展项目中部署的具体动态能力（例如，动态关系能力），探讨了其微观基础，展示了这些能力与不同的供应链设计（SCD）如何结合，以及这些匹配如何随时间演变。一个显著的发现是参与创新和技术扩展项目的汽车制造商需要摆脱传统的二元供应链设计选择（即模块化与整体化），转向一种不那么严苛的供应链设计，我们称之为“演变型供应链设计”，该设计对于资源有限和市场位置变化的公司尤其有价值。实践意义：本研究概述了可行的扩展路径，并提供了关于将供应链设计与能力对齐的指导。研究结果还展示了管理者如何利用时间上的配置变化，战略性地应对从最初市场进入时关注的知识产权保护和能力获取，到后期阶段围绕供应商可靠性和产能等挑战的演变优先事项。原创性/价值：本研究引入了演变型供应链设计的概念，这种设计特别适合初创公司满足扩展要求。此次研究丰富了对如何管理扩展项目的理解，提供了新的实证见解，说明制造商如何通过将供应链设计与能力精简对接，从而成功实现扩展。

idea_papers.title: Peer Effects in Corporate ESG: Evidence from Mandatory Disclosure and Philanthropic Giving
idea_papers.title_cn: 企业环境、社会与治理（ESG）中的同伴效应：来自强制性披露和慈善捐赠的证据

idea_papers.title: Bridging Knowledge Capability Gaps: Digital Technology Offsetting in Interfirm Knowledge Transfer
idea_papers.title_cn: 弥补知识能力差距：数字技术在企业间知识转移中的补偿作用
idea_papers.abstract: Abstract In this digital age, the adoption of digital technology (DT) is changing traditional business processes. Against this backdrop, we try to answer the question of whether DT could effectively bridge any interfirm knowledge capability gaps. Though effective knowledge transfer is dependent on the sender's and the receiver's knowledge capabilities, literature attributes very limited attention to their combined effects. Using signalling metaphor as the guiding framework, we forward disseminative capacity and absorptive capacity as the key capabilities of the sender and receiver, respectively, and study their combined effects on relational performance within vertical interfirm relationships. Additionally, with the belief that comprehending how DT could interplay with these capabilities holds crucial importance, we test the conjecture that DT can bridge knowledge capability gaps pertaining to the sender or the receiver. We position our hypotheses using the relational view and test them using the response surface methodology. The analysis is conducted based on a multi‐respondent dyadic survey dataset that is augmented with secondary data and longitudinal performance data. Our findings showcase that disseminative capacity and absorptive capacity are natural counterparts and that the channel effectiveness resulting from adopting DT could serve as an offsetting capability that can effectively bridge certain knowledge capability gaps.
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 摘要 在这个数字时代，数字技术（DT）的采用正在改变传统商业流程。在此背景下，我们试图回答一个问题：数字技术是否能够有效弥补企业间的知识能力差距。尽管有效的知识转移依赖于发送者和接收者的知识能力，但文献对它们的综合影响关注甚少。我们以信号传递隐喻为指导框架，提出传播能力和吸收能力分别作为发送者和接收者的关键能力，并研究它们在垂直企业间关系中的综合影响。此外，我们认为理解数字技术如何与这些能力相互作用至关重要，因此我们检验了数字技术能够弥补与发送者或接收者相关的知识能力差距的假设。我们基于关系视角定位我们的假设，并使用响应面方法进行检验。分析基于一个多响应者的双边调查数据集，并结合了次级数据和纵向绩效数据。我们的研究结果表明，传播能力和吸收能力是自然的对应关系，而采用数字技术所带来的渠道有效性可以作为一种补偿能力，有效弥补某些知识能力差距。

idea_papers.title: Class-incremental visual scene understanding for multi-stage construction via sequential knowledge distillation and exemplar replay
idea_papers.title_cn: 通过序列知识蒸馏和示例重放实现多阶段建筑的类增量视觉场景理解

idea_papers.title: Knowledge and data co-driven Bayesian network for personalized user experience evaluation of smart product service system
idea_papers.title_cn: 基于知识和数据共同驱动的贝叶斯网络用于智能产品服务系统的个性化用户体验评估

idea_papers.title: Investigating the Causes and Their Interactions Leading to Supply Chain Risks in Prefabricated Construction: Configuration Perspective
idea_papers.title_cn: 调查导致预制建筑供应链风险的原因及其相互作用：配置视角
idea_papers.journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
idea_papers.abstract: The additional stakeholders and production environments within the networked supply chains of prefabricated construction (PC) have aggravated multiple causes of supply chain risks (SCRs) and their complex interactions. However, existing research primarily focused on risk identification and assessment, with limited exploration of how SCRs are generated by these causes and their interactions in different configurations. This study develops a hybrid method to investigate the configurational and interactive impacts of these causes on SCRs. First, a literature review was used to identify 35 causes, which were classified into 9 categories. Second, two rounds of questionnaire surveys and an expert interview within China’s construction sector were conducted for data collection. Then, fuzzy set qualitative comparative analysis (fsQCA) was used to identify the configurations of causes leading to SCRs. A fuzzy Bayesian network (FBN) model was subsequently developed to explore the causes’ interactions under different configurations. Finally, scenario analysis was conducted by the FBN model to identify the optimal SCRs management scenarios (MS). Results reveal two types of configurations of SCRs causes: process and network-oriented, and environment-oriented configurations, in which the environment causes, as well as information and partnerships causes, exhibit mutually substitutive effects in triggering SCRs. Also, the key causal paths triggering SCRs differ across those two configurations, with the former being mainly characterized by planning, procurement, and manufacturing-led paths, and the latter being characterized by environment-led paths. Moreover, addressing the same risk cause in different configurations demonstrates heterogeneous effects on SCRs prevention. In addition, tackling risk causes located in multiple positions (root and non-root nodes) in the FBN model proves to be more effective than focusing on those located in a single position in SCRs prevention. By innovatively integrating both configuration and interaction perspectives to explore the causes leading to SCRs and their interrelationships, this study not only enhances the configuration understanding of SCRs formation in PC, but also quantitatively reveals the heterogeneous influence paths through which those causes collectively contribute to SCRs. The integration of fsQCA and FBN (fsQCA-FBN) framework developed in this study establishes a novel analytical paradigm that can be applied to other project-based industries for SCRs mitigation. Valuable implications for improving risk management effectiveness can also be drawn from the key causal paths and MS for industry practitioners to mitigate SCRs.
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 在预制建筑（PC）的网络供应链中，额外的利益相关者和生产环境加剧了供应链风险（SCRs）的多重成因及其复杂的相互作用。然而，现有研究主要集中在风险识别和评估上，对这些成因及其在不同配置中相互作用如何生成SCRs的探索有限。本研究开发了一种混合方法，以调查这些成因对SCRs的配置和互动影响。首先，通过文献综述识别出35个成因，并将其分类为9个类别。其次，在中国建筑行业进行两轮问卷调查和专家访谈以收集数据。然后，采用模糊集定性比较分析（fsQCA）识别导致SCRs的成因配置。随后，开发了模糊贝叶斯网络（FBN）模型，以探讨不同配置下成因的相互作用。最后，通过FBN模型进行情景分析，以识别最佳的SCRs管理情景（MS）。结果揭示了两种类型的SCRs成因配置：以过程和网络为导向的配置，以及以环境为导向的配置，其中环境成因以及信息和合作伙伴成因在触发SCRs方面表现出相互替代的效应。此外，触发SCRs的关键因果路径在这两种配置中有所不同，前者主要以规划、采购和制造主导的路径为特征，后者则以环境主导的路径为特征。此外，在不同配置中解决相同的风险成因对SCRs的预防表现出异质效应。此外，处理位于FBN模型中多个位置（根节点和非根节点）的风险成因被证明比仅关注位于单一位置的成因在SCRs预防中更为有效。通过创新性地整合配置和互动视角来探讨导致SCRs的成因及其相互关系，本研究不仅增强了对PC中SCRs形成的配置理解，还定量揭示了这些成因共同贡献于SCRs的异质影响路径。本研究开发的fsQCA和FBN（fsQCA-FBN）框架建立了一种新颖的分析范式，可以应用于其他基于项目的行业以减轻SCRs。行业从业者也可以从关键因果路径和MS中获得有价值的启示，以提高风险管理的有效性。

idea_papers.title: Risk transmission and control in the prefabricated construction multi-project supply chain network: a SIS modeling approach
idea_papers.title_cn: 预制建筑多项目供应链网络中的风险传递与控制：一种SIS建模方法
idea_papers.abstract: Purpose The prefabricated construction supply chain (PCSC) is vulnerable to disruption from unforeseen events due to the precise coordination and transportation demands among various sections. This study aims to develop a prefabricated construction multi-project supply chain (PCMSC) risk transmission model to simulate and explain the mechanism of risk transmission in PCMSC. Design/methodology/approach This study constructs a complex network based on contract data of prefabricated construction (PC) projects from a well-known Chinese real estate development company. Four indicators – dependence level, resistance capacity, adaptation capacity and resilience – are incorporated into the SIS model to better adapt to the characteristics of PCSC. When unforeseen events occur, risk transmission paths in PCMSC can be simulated, and suppliers with potential risks can be identified. Findings The premise for risk transmission between projects is to have a common supplier. A high supplier localization rate can mitigate the risk of cross-regional transmission. A strong strategic partner can effectively defend against risk transmission from other areas. Moreover, improving enterprise resilience can effectively control risk transmission. Originality/value This study provides theoretical guidance for the holistic and dynamic analysis of risk transmission in the PCMSC. Meanwhile, this study develops an application framework of the epidemic model for supply chain management research, with specific adaptation to the characteristics of PCMSC and validation in practical case scenarios. In practice, PC project owners can apply the model for risk monitoring and control both in regular production and in unforeseen events.
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 目的 预制建筑供应链（PCSC）由于各个环节之间精确的协调和运输需求，容易受到突发事件的干扰。本研究旨在开发一个预制建筑多项目供应链（PCMSC）风险传播模型，以模拟和解释PCMSC中风险传播的机制。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究基于一家知名中国房地产开发公司的预制建筑（PC）项目合同数据构建了一个复杂网络。将依赖水平、抵抗能力、适应能力和韧性四个指标纳入SIS模型，以更好地适应PCSC的特征。当突发事件发生时，可以模拟PCMSC中的风险传播路径，并识别出潜在风险的供应商。 发现 项目之间风险传播的前提是拥有一个共同的供应商。高供应商本地化率可以减轻跨区域传播的风险。强大的战略合作伙伴能够有效防御来自其他地区的风险传播。此外，提高企业韧性可以有效控制风险传播。 原创性/价值 本研究为PCMSC中风险传播的整体和动态分析提供了理论指导。同时，本研究开发了一个适用于供应链管理研究的流行病模型应用框架，具体适应PCMSC的特征，并在实际案例场景中进行了验证。在实践中，PC项目业主可以应用该模型进行常规生产和突发事件中的风险监测和控制。

idea_papers.title: Decoding crash narratives: a comparative evaluation of large language models for accident cause classification
idea_papers.title_cn: 解码事故叙述：大型语言模型在事故原因分类中的比较评估

idea_papers.title: A pavement maintenance decision-making method based on a retrieval-augmented generation framework with large language models
idea_papers.title_cn: 基于检索增强生成框架与大语言模型的路面维护决策方法

idea_papers.title: Unlocking the potential of urban spatial structure to shape building energy demand at a large scale
idea_papers.title_cn: 释放城市空间结构的潜力，以大规模塑造建筑能耗需求

idea_papers.title: LLM-QueryBC: An LLM-Based Regulation Query System for Textual and Tabular Information in Building Codes
idea_papers.title_cn: LLM-QueryBC：一个基于大型语言模型的建筑法规文本和表格信息查询系统
idea_papers.journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
idea_papers.abstract: The process of querying building codes has long been time-consuming and labor-intensive, requiring extensive manual effort to repeatedly consult and confirm regulations throughout design and review phases. Existing regulation query systems are limited to simple searches, often resulting in errors and failing to provide intelligent responses to users. Although the emergence of large language models (LLMs) offers potential solutions due to their natural language processing abilities, they face challenges such as insufficient domain knowledge, semantic misalignment, and difficulties in handling complex tabular data. To address these limitations, we propose a novel system, LLMs Query Building Codes (LLM-QueryBC), which integrates LLMs with a semantic network–enhanced retrieval-augmented generation (SN-RAG) for text-based queries and a specialized agent called Agent for Tables in Building Codes (TaBCe) for tabular queries. TaBCe leverages the Reasoning and Acting (ReAct) framework, think-by-structure planning method, RAG, computational tools, and a memory module to enhance its functionality. The system autonomously determines internal logic, invokes external tools, and mitigates hallucination issues associated with LLMs in the building code domain. We evaluated our system using fire safety regulations—a critical domain due to its impact on life safety, property protection, and legal compliance. Experimental results demonstrated significant improvements: textual query accuracy increased by 24%, and tabular query accuracy rose by 25%. Additionally, we conducted a case study involving fire safety code queries for a real-world design of a mixed-use high-rise building, further validating the system’s practical applicability. These advancements offer greater value to users and promote broader adoption of intelligent regulation query systems.
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 查询建筑规范的过程长期以来一直耗时且劳动密集，需要在设计和审核阶段进行大量手动工作，以反复查阅和确认相关法规。目前的法规查询系统仅限于简单搜索，常常导致错误，并未能为用户提供智能响应。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）的出现由于其自然语言处理能力提供了潜在的解决方案，但它们面临着如领域知识不足、语义不一致以及处理复杂表格数据的困难等挑战。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种新型系统，名为LLMs查询建筑规范（LLM-QueryBC），该系统将LLMs与语义网络增强的检索增强生成（SN-RAG）相结合，用于文本查询，并结合一个称为建筑规范表格代理（TaBCe）的专门代理，处理表格查询。TaBCe利用推理与行动（ReAct）框架、结构思维规划方法、RAG、计算工具和内存模块来增强其功能。该系统能够自主确定内部逻辑，调用外部工具，并减少与建筑规范领域相关的LLMs幻觉问题。我们使用消防安全法规对系统进行了评估——这是一个关键领域，因为它对生命安全、财产保护和法律合规具有重要影响。实验结果显示了显著的改善：文本查询准确率提高了24%，表格查询准确率上升了25%。此外，我们还进行了案例研究，涉及混合用途高层建筑的消防安全规范查询，进一步验证了该系统的实际适用性。这些进步为用户提供了更大的价值，并促进了智能法规查询系统的更广泛采用。

idea_papers.title: Intelligent generation system for prefabricated construction site layout planning: dual-domain collaborative optimization integrating the dynamic graph penalty propagation
idea_papers.title_cn: 智能生成系统用于预制建筑工地布局规划：集成动态图惩罚传播的双域协同优化

idea_papers.title: Exploring Digital–Real Integration in the Construction Industry: Driving Force of Digital Technology Innovation Network Embedding
idea_papers.title_cn: 探索建筑行业数字与现实的融合：数字技术创新网络嵌入的驱动力
idea_papers.journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
idea_papers.abstract: Digital–real integration is an important driving force to propel industry transformation, upgrading, and sustainable development. Existing studies have considered digital–real integration as an independent variable, but few have considered it as a dependent variable. This study, taking the construction industry as the research scenario, investigates the impact of network embedding on digital–real integration from a complex network perspective. Using digital technology patents identified by a novel method as the database, this paper constructs a digital technology innovation network. Based on this, it develops a novel indicator to measure digital–real integration at the micro level as the dependent variable, investigates the direct influence of network embedding on digital–real integration, and assesses the moderating role of node clustering in this process. Furthermore, utilizing enterprises’ cash flows as a basis, this paper categorizes enterprises into growth, maturity, and decline stages, and examines the effect of embedding on digital–real integration across each of these stages. This study revealed that structural and relational embedding positively impacts digital–real integration, whereas knowledge element clustering exhibits a negative moderating effect. Additionally, an inverted U-shaped relationship was observed between the knowledge element ratio and digital–real integration. It is noteworthy that relational embedding becomes a key factor for construction enterprises in improving digital–real integration level, and construction enterprises can optimize the proportion of knowledge elements to find new transformation opportunities in the decline stage. This paper provides theoretical and practical guidance for construction enterprises to effectively configure their own knowledge structure to enhance the digital–real integration level.
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 数字与实体的融合是推动产业转型、升级和可持续发展的重要动力。现有研究将数字与实体的融合视为自变量，但很少将其视为因变量。本研究以建筑行业为研究场景，从复杂网络的视角探讨网络嵌入对数字与实体融合的影响。通过一种新颖的方法识别数字技术专利作为数据库，构建数字技术创新网络。在此基础上，开发了一种新指标，以微观层面测量数字与实体的融合，并将其作为因变量，研究网络嵌入对数字与实体融合的直接影响，并评估节点聚类在此过程中的调节作用。此外，利用企业的现金流作为基础，将企业划分为增长、成熟和衰退阶段，并考察嵌入对这些阶段的数字与实体融合的影响。本研究揭示，结构性和关系性嵌入对数字与实体的融合产生积极影响，而知识要素聚类则表现出负向调节效应。此外，观察到知识要素比例与数字与实体融合之间存在倒U型关系。值得注意的是，关系性嵌入成为建筑企业提升数字与实体融合水平的关键因素，建筑企业可以优化知识要素的比例，以在衰退阶段寻找新的转型机会。本文为建筑企业有效配置自身的知识结构以增强数字与实体融合水平提供了理论和实践指导。

idea_papers.title: 面向极端天气扰动的电力应急物资提升配电网韧性三阶段调配优化模型
idea_papers.title_cn: 面向极端天气扰动的电力应急物资提升配电网韧性三阶段调配优化模型
idea_papers.abstract: 面向极端天气对交通网-配电网造成的双重扰动,为提升配电网韧性,本文将交通网延误系数纳入配电网韧性评估模型,建立事前-事中-事后动态评估模型;进而,考虑配电网、交通网扰动效应不确定性特征,提出电力应急物资三阶段调配优化模型:事前在成本可控范围内选取最恶劣场景开展储备节点及储备置信优化;事中考虑交通拥堵影响动态调整路径开展紧急配送优化;事后考虑偏差电量开展传统应急资源与分布式电源协同响应优化.算例验证...

idea_papers.title: 人工智能赋能平台生态系统重构：价值破坏与价值共创研究
idea_papers.title_cn: 人工智能赋能平台生态系统重构：价值破坏与价值共创研究
idea_papers.abstract: 新一代信息技术发展下，人工智能正重塑平台生态系统，推动价值创造与分配模式变革。本研究基于长三角地区340家深度参与数字平台的高新技术企业调研数据，探究人工智能赋能下平台生态系统重构的双重效应：价值共创与价值破坏。研究发现，传统平台生态系统受人力与规则引擎限制，模式僵化、效率低下。人工智能引入后，以替代性人机协作（如任务自动化）和增强性人机协作（如能力拓展）颠覆原有机制；以生成性AI（如内容生成）和...
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 新一代信息技术发展下，人工智能正重塑平台生态系统，推动价值创造与分配模式变革。本研究基于长三角地区340家深度参与数字平台的高新技术企业调研数据，探究人工智能赋能下平台生态系统重构的双重效应：价值共创与价值破坏。研究发现，传统平台生态系统受人力与规则引擎限制，模式僵化、效率低下。人工智能引入后，以替代性人机协作（如任务自动化）和增强性人机协作（如能力拓展）颠覆原有机制；以生成性AI（如内容生成）和...

idea_papers.title: 跨国技术并购高价值创造的组态路径研究
idea_papers.title_cn: 跨国技术并购高价值创造的组态路径研究
idea_papers.abstract: 中国企业的跨国并购策略已经从资源寻求型转变为技术寻求型，但跨国技术并购实践面临着重大挑战。考虑到现有单因素净效应研究无法揭示跨国技术并购高价值创造的复杂因果机制，本文基于理论视角法和文献归纳法，以22家中国上市企业跨国技术并购为例，采用fsQCA研究方法对跨国技术并购高价值创造对应的组态路径及典型案例进行分析。研究发现：（1）制度距离、企业特征、吸收能力和交易特征都不是跨国技术并购高价值创造的必要...
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 中国企业的跨国并购策略已经从资源寻求型转变为技术寻求型，但跨国技术并购实践面临着重大挑战。考虑到现有单因素净效应研究无法揭示跨国技术并购高价值创造的复杂因果机制，本文基于理论视角法和文献归纳法，以22家中国上市企业跨国技术并购为例，采用fsQCA研究方法对跨国技术并购高价值创造对应的组态路径及典型案例进行分析。研究发现：（1）制度距离、企业特征、吸收能力和交易特征都不是跨国技术并购高价值创造的必要...

idea_papers.title: 算力部署对企业关键核心技术创新的影响研究——基于知识理论的视角
idea_papers.title_cn: 算力部署对企业关键核心技术创新的影响研究——基于知识理论的视角
idea_papers.abstract: 在全球数字竞争与技术博弈日趋激烈的背景下，算力作为核心生产力已成为影响企业创新格局的关键变量。本文基于2007—2023年A股上市企业数据，运用固定效应模型实证检验算力部署对企业关键核心技术创新的影响。研究发现：（1）算力部署显著推动了企业关键核心技术创新。（2）算力部署通过推动知识多元化、知识跨界交互与知识重组创造促进企业关键核心技术创新。（3）供应链纵向联动和产学研知识共创发挥正向调节作用。（...
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 在全球数字竞争与技术博弈日趋激烈的背景下，算力作为核心生产力已成为影响企业创新格局的关键变量。本文基于2007—2023年A股上市企业数据，运用固定效应模型实证检验算力部署对企业关键核心技术创新的影响。研究发现：（1）算力部署显著推动了企业关键核心技术创新。（2）算力部署通过推动知识多元化、知识跨界交互与知识重组创造促进企业关键核心技术创新。（3）供应链纵向联动和产学研知识共创发挥正向调节作用。（...

idea_papers.title: 企业技术竞合的研发投入效应研究
idea_papers.title_cn: 企业技术竞合的研发投入效应研究
idea_papers.abstract: 研发投入是企业获取竞争优势的重要保障，从技术竞合的角度激励企业加大研发投入是目前创新研究领域重点关注的议题之一。然而，企业应构建何种类型的技术竞合关系以提升研发投入一直存在分歧和争议。本文运用竞合理论，基于技术竞合形成路径视角将其解构为企业与竞争对手合作、企业与合作伙伴竞争两种类型，以 2007-2022年中国医药制造上市公司为样本，分别探讨两类技术竞合对企业研发投入的作用机制及影响结果，并检验地...
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 研发投入是企业获取竞争优势的重要保障，从技术竞合的角度激励企业加大研发投入是目前创新研究领域重点关注的议题之一。然而，企业应构建何种类型的技术竞合关系以提升研发投入一直存在分歧和争议。本文运用竞合理论，基于技术竞合形成路径视角将其解构为企业与竞争对手合作、企业与合作伙伴竞争两种类型，以 2007-2022年中国医药制造上市公司为样本，分别探讨两类技术竞合对企业研发投入的作用机制及影响结果，并检验地...

idea_papers.title: 绿色技术创新城市网络地位提升前因组态研究
idea_papers.title_cn: 绿色技术创新城市网络地位提升前因组态研究
idea_papers.abstract: 明晰如何提升绿色技术创新城市网络地位对于弥合城市间绿色技术创新发展差距，实现国家“双碳”目标具有重要意义。该研究基于2015-2021年企业级绿色技术专利大数据刻画了中国绿色技术创新城市网络，构建了包含“供求端”营商环境、城市行政级别及经济发展水平三方面条件提升绿色技术创新城市网络地位的理论模型，并运用动态QCA方法进行了实证研究。研究发现：(1)绿色技术创新城市网络具有流动性和稳定性特点并存的“...
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 明晰如何提升绿色技术创新城市网络地位对于弥合城市间绿色技术创新发展差距，实现国家“双碳”目标具有重要意义。该研究基于2015-2021年企业级绿色技术专利大数据刻画了中国绿色技术创新城市网络，构建了包含“供求端”营商环境、城市行政级别及经济发展水平三方面条件提升绿色技术创新城市网络地位的理论模型，并运用动态QCA方法进行了实证研究。研究发现：(1)绿色技术创新城市网络具有流动性和稳定性特点并存的“...

idea_papers.title: 数据要素何以成就颠覆性创新——源于技术要素耦合协调的证据
idea_papers.title_cn: 数据要素何以成就颠覆性创新——源于技术要素耦合协调的证据
idea_papers.abstract: 在数字经济的浪潮中，数据要素与技术要素的耦合协调已成为推动企业颠覆性创新的关键力量。从知识基础视角出发，以专利知识宽度和人才知识转移程度为中介变量、知识产权保护为调节变量，结合2012‐2021年中国储能上市企业的数据，采用面板负二项模型探究区域数据要素和技术要素耦合协调与颠覆性创新之间的非线性关系。结果发现：(1)数据要素的非竞争性、规模效应递增等特性，使其与技术要素的耦合协调具有资源配置与激励...
idea_papers.abstract_cn: 在数字经济的浪潮中，数据要素与技术要素的耦合协调已成为推动企业颠覆性创新的关键力量。从知识基础视角出发，以专利知识宽度和人才知识转移程度为中介变量、知识产权保护为调节变量，结合2012‐2021年中国储能上市企业的数据，采用面板负二项模型探究区域数据要素和技术要素耦合协调与颠覆性创新之间的非线性关系。结果发现：(1)数据要素的非竞争性、规模效应递增等特性，使其与技术要素的耦合协调具有资源配置与激励...
